name: Baird Park
description: Baird Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rome, TN. There are 4 outdoor courts.

name: Carthage City Park
description:
Great spot for pickleball! 
Still relatively new, Bright blue courts, with crisp white lines. Tall fencing around the important parts, with plenty of access gates. 
May want to bring a broom for left-side court, the tree above it provides nice shading, but lots of debris.
open_play_schedule: The Park is open from Sunrise-Sunset.

name: Crump Paris Park
description: Come play pickleball at Crump Paris Park in South Carthage, TN! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The court is free.

name: Ivy Agee Park
description:
Good outdoor Pickleball Courts.
Well maintained, with great location. 
Relatively new courts in perfect condition!
